programs.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programs.desc: Some of Britain's favourite personalities hit the sofa and tune in for The 1% Club, Spy in the Ocean, Fake Profile, The Yorkshire Vet and lots more great TV.

programs.title: First Dates
programs.desc: Confident soldier Paul is the opposite of what ex girl band member Natalie goes for. But will she fall for his charm? And can weightlifting octogenarian Dave woo elegant Clare.

programs.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programs.desc: Gordon revisits the most contentious restaurant he's ever tried to rescue - Amy's Baking Company, in Scottsdale, Arizona.

programs.title: Pixie
programs.desc: Dark comedy with Olivia Cooke, Alec Baldwin and Colm Meaney. A young woman devises a series of elaborate heists and schemes to fund a new life.

programs.title: Unreported World
programs.desc: Puerto Rico: The island of Puerto Rico has become a portal for narcotics entering the US but also a victim of a devastating fentanyl epidemic. Guillermo Galdos reports.

programs.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: The culinary competition visits Berkshire, in a week featuring unconventional home decor, a military drill and a self-confessed 'masterchef'.
